name: Robinhood
description_short: The pioneer of commission-free trading with a simple mobile interface, crypto, and cash management features.
description_long:
Robinhood revolutionized the brokerage industry by introducing commission-free trading, forcing the entire industry to follow suit. The platform remains one of the most accessible entry points for new investors, with a clean mobile-first interface that makes buying and selling stocks, ETFs, options, and crypto straightforward.

Beyond trading, Robinhood offers a cash management account with competitive interest rates, a credit card, and retirement accounts (IRAs) with a 1% match on contributions. Robinhood Gold at $5/month adds professional research from Morningstar, Level 2 market data, and higher instant deposit limits.

While Robinhood has matured significantly from its early days, it still prioritizes simplicity over advanced features. Traders who need sophisticated charting, complex order types, or advanced risk management tools will find the platform limiting. However, for casual investors and those just starting their trading journey, Robinhood remains hard to beat.
cons: Very limited charting and analysis tools
meta_description: The pioneer of commission-free trading with a simple mobile interface, crypto, and cash management features.
